inputs.text: A stunning Korean idol woman with warm caramel balayage long hair and wispy bangs, diamond face shape with defined brows, serene contemplative expression, looking over her shoulder toward camera. Full body head to toe, shot from behind on 35mm lens, environmental portrait. She wears a midnight navy sequined evening gown that catches autumn light, standing on a leaf-strewn path in a golden autumn park. Crimson and amber leaves drift around her silhouette. Ring light beauty lighting illuminates her flawless porcelain skin with visible pores, styled dewy makeup with soft gradient lips. Cinematic color grading, warm amber tones, shallow depth of field, SDXL hyperrealism, extremely detailed, no text, no watermarks.
